Title: 2026 Climate Resilience Grant Program
Description: The Nature Conservancy is offering a sixth round of Climate Resilience Grants in New York to support local conservation and climate adaptation efforts.

Title: Local Leadership For Climate Adaptation Grant
Description: Up to $1 million available for Canadian municipalities to improve climate adaptation through the Local Leadership for Climate Adaptation Grant. Deadline: August 14, 2024.

Title: Community Resilience Centers - Strategic Growth Council
Description: SGC’s CRC program will fund new construction and upgrades of neighborhood-level resilience centers to provide shelter and resources during climate and other emergencies. The program will also fund year-round services and ongoing programming that build overall community resilience.
